title: rubus glandulosus var. foliosus
intro: Rubus glandulosus var. foliosus, also known as the thorny raspberry or leafy thimbleberry, is a variety of the Rubus glandulosus plant, which is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus glandulosus var. foliosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, and are often used to support overall well-being and immune function.
